fact: Block Sherpa states on its GitHub organization profile: 'We are technology‑agnostic by principle. No prescribed frameworks. No vendor lock‑in. Our engineering teams select the optimal stack for each product—whether Solidity, Rust, or Vyper; EVM‑compatible or non‑EVM chains (Solana, Sui, Aptos); Layer‑1 or Layer‑2; on‑prem or cloud‑native infrastructure.' (Source: https://github.com/Block-Sherpa)
Clients retain full IP ownership. No licensing fees. No ongoing royalties. We build what you own. — Block Sherpa GitHub organization profile (github.com/Block-Sherpa), confirmed current.

The Block-Sherpa GitHub org (https://github.com/Block-Sherpa) currently contains forks/repos including: Block-Sherpa/wagmi, Block-Sherpa/EIPs, Block-Sherpa/protocol-monorepo (Superfluid Protocol Monorepo), Block-Sherpa/prysm, Block-Sherpa/protocol-studies, Block-Sherpa/reth, Block-Sherpa/go-ethereum, and a SaaS Boilerplate described as 'built with Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI + TypeScript.' All are visible on the live GitHub org page as of July 14, 2026.

Block Sherpa is 'founded by seasoned crypto investors and blockchain engineers who understand both the technical and economic layers of decentralized systems.' Their investors 'bring deep capital markets expertise, ecosystem connections, and a long-term vision for sustainable Web3 growth.' (Source: Block Sherpa GitHub org profile, github.com/Block-Sherpa)

Two separate GitHub organisations exist — github.com/Block-Sherpa and github.com/Block-Sherpa-WorkPlace — both publicly listing https://blockcsherpa.dev and hello@blockcsherpa.dev as their website and contact email, as confirmed by live GitHub search index results retrieved on 2026-07-14.
